Common.confirmLogout: Are you sure you want to logout?

hero.title: Family Legends
hero.description: Your favorite community for the mightiest legends in the gaming world. Join us now and experience an unparalleled gaming journey with the best Arab players.

rules.title: Covenant Engravings
rules.subtitle: To ensure a fun and fair experience for all, please adhere to the sacred engravings that rule our world.
rules.sectionSubtitle: To ensure a fun and fair experience for all, please adhere to the sacred engravings that govern our world and oversee the order of our legendary community.
rules.emptyDescription: The sacred laws will be inscribed here soon.

team.title: Leaders of Legends
team.subtitle: Meet the masterminds and heroes who dedicate their time to building and developing our legendary community to deliver the best possible experience.

partners.title: Alliance
partners.subtitle: Discover servers and communities that share our vision and adventure in the gaming world.
partners.cardDescription: Join the Family Legends and earn a place among the best Arabic servers. Get free promotion and mutual support.
partners.emptyDescription: Be the first to join the legends' records! Send an alliance request for your server now.

streamers.title: Streaming Legends
streamers.subtitle: An elite group of content creators who share moments of glory and adventure in the gaming world with us.

cta.heading: What are you waiting for? Join
cta.description: Be part of the legends community and discover a world of adventures, challenges, and friends waiting for you every moment. Join the largest Arab gaming community now!

dialogs.deleteTitle: Are you sure you want to delete?
dialogs.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone and the data will be permanently deleted from the database.
